sections.label: One Microeconomics Course
sections.description: One ECO course in microeconomics (e.g., ECO-237, ECO-247, ECO-345, ECO-446, ECO-447). Confirm with department.

sections.label: One Macroeconomics Course
sections.description: One ECO course in macroeconomics (e.g., ECO-255, ECO-315, ECO-336, ECO-442, ECO-495). Confirm with department.

sections.label: Two Additional Economics Courses (one 200+, one 300+)
sections.description: Two additional ECO courses; one must be numbered 200 or higher and one must be 300 or higher.
